lang_en.display_script:
Bitcoin whales are loading up while everyone else panics.

Bitcoin sits at $71,573, up just under 1% in the last 24 hours. The big story today: on-chain analytics firm Santiment reports that whale wallets are aggressively accumulating at this level. They're calling it a positive reversal signal.

Here's why this matters. Historically, when whales buy and retail sells, it marks a market bottom. Santiment says they're now watching for increased retail selling to confirm the setup. Smart money is positioning while the market looks boring.

Keep your eyes on whale activity this week. If you found this useful, hit subscribe and like. Stay sharp.
lang_en.tts_script:
Bitcoin whales are loading up while everyone else panics.

Bitcoin sits at seventy-one thousand five hundred seventy-three dollars, up just under one percent in the last twenty-four hours. The big story today: on-chain analytics firm Santiment reports that whale wallets are aggressively accumulating at this level. They're calling it a positive reversal signal.

Here's why this matters. Historically, when whales buy and retail sells, it marks a market bottom. Santiment says they're now watching for increased retail selling to confirm the setup. Smart money is positioning while the market looks boring.

Keep your eyes on whale activity this week. If you found this useful, hit subscribe and like. Stay sharp.

metadata.title: BTC $71,573  Whales Are Loading Up While You Panic
metadata.description: Bitcoin whales are aggressively accumulating at $71,573 as retail investors sell off. On-chain analytics firm Santiment calls it a positive reversal signal  historically, whale buying during retail panic marks a market bottom. Smart money is positioning now. #Bitcoin #BTC #CryptoNews #BitcoinWhales #Shorts #CryptoShorts

lang_ko.display_script:
비트코인 고래들이 모두가 패닉할 때, 오히려 매집하고 있습니다.

비트코인은 현재 $71,573에 거래 중이며, 지난 24시간 동안 약 1% 상승했습니다. 오늘의 핵심 뉴스, 온체인 분석 기업 산티멘트에 따르면, 고래 지갑들이 이 가격대에서 공격적으로 매집 중입니다. 산티멘트는 이를 긍정적인 반전 신호라고 평가했습니다.

이것이 중요한 이유입니다. 역사적으로 고래가 매수하고, 개인 투자자가 매도할 때, 시장 바닥이 형성됐습니다. 산티멘트는 현재 개인 투자자들의 매도 증가를 주시하며, 패턴 완성을 확인 중입니다. 스마트 머니는 시장이 조용할 때 포지션을 잡고 있습니다.

이번 주 고래 움직임을 주목하세요. 유용했다면 구독과 좋아요 부탁드립니다. 항상 깨어 있으세요.

lang_ja.display_script:
ビットコインクジラが、市場の恐怖の中で大量買いを進めています。

現在$71,573で取引中、24時間で約1%上昇。注目はオンチェーン分析企業Santimentの報告です。クジラウォレットがこの価格帯で、積極的に買い増ししており、反転シグナルと見ています。

歴史的に、クジラが買い個人が売る時、市場は底を打ちます。Santimentは個人投資家の売りが増えるか注視中。賢い資金は、市場が静かな今こそ仕込んでいます。

今週のクジラの動きに注目です。役に立ったら、チャンネル登録とグッドボタンをお願いします。
